description_long: This bird has a compact, rounded body with soft gray plumage that transitions into subtle darker shades along the wings and tail. Its head is proportionally large with a short, thick, conical beak, ideal for cracking seeds. The eyes are dark and prominent, set high on the head, giving it a gentle expression. The wings are neatly folded against the body, showing faint feather patterning, while the tail is short and slightly rounded at the tip. The legs are slender and dark, ending in sharp claws suitable for perching. Overall, the bird's appearance is reminiscent of a small urban finch or sparrow, blending well into city parks and gardens.
description: A small, gray bird with a rounded body, conical beak, and subtle feather patterning, resembling a finch or sparrow. It has dark legs and a short, rounded tail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's broad chest, symmetrical wings, and large head with the beak pointing forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the conical beak, rounded head, and the smooth gradient of gray feathers along the body and wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the subtle feather pattern on the back, and the short, rounded tail feathers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the beak profile, eye placement, and the gentle curve of the body and tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid gray with subtle gradients and faint mottling on wings and back
